summary: Frontend testing of 3 new features: 1) Línea Paquete style in Appearance (5th style option), 2) Tarjeta style full-width, 3) Socios Asignar evento panel, expand events counter, toggle Pendiente/Pagado. All 8 test cases passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features fully working. Appearance page has 5 dashboard recent styles (linea, linea_paquete, tarjeta, compacto, banda). Linea Paquete shows 'Básico/Sin paquete' badges instead of amounts. Tarjeta style = full-width single-column cards. Socios: assign-event-btn opens AssignEventPanel with select+honorario field; expand-events-btn-{id} expands event list; toggle-payment-{evId}-{socioId} toggles Pendiente↔Pagado with toast confirmation.

test_results.expand_events_counter_shows_events: PASS - shows 2 events for first socio
